full_text:
Cao Jun 曹均
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Jun (曹均). Transferred to the line of his uncle, had a child. Cao Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
